rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score of 4/10 and rest on the same substantive concerns: lack of Director-level/strategic enterprise advisory experience, only recent AI tooling exposure rather than deep recognized AI/ML expertise, and absence of the preferred Master's/PhD in an AI field. The strengths cited (15+ years experience, open-source platform founder, technical leadership and public speaking) are also identical. The wording differs but no concern, score shift, or reasoning keys off the changed name; the variation is ordinary run-to-run rephrasing.
